results.rendered_html: amūrta (3. a + mūrta) adj. unkörperlich: dve vāva brahmaṇo rūpe mūrtaṃ caivāmūrtaṃ ca  ŚAT. BR. 14,5,3,1 . =  BṚH. ĀR. UP. 2,3,1 .  MUṆḌ. UP. 2,1,2 .  PRAŚNOP. 1,5 .  KATHĀS. 20,70 .  PRAB. 71,13 .  VOP. 23,29 .

results.rendered_html:
amūrta a. Formless, shapeless, incorporeal, unembodied (opp. mūrta where  Muktā.  says mūrtatvaṃ = avacchinnaparimāṇavattvaṃ).
— rtaḥ N. of Śiva.
Comp.
— guṇaḥ (In  Vaiś.  phil.) a quality considered to be amūrta or incorporeal such as dharma, adharma &c.; dharmādharmau bhāvanā ca śabdo buddhyādayopi ca . ete'mūrtaguṇāḥ sarve Bhāṣa
